name: QDirStat
longDescription:
QDirStat is a Qt-based graphical disk-usage analyzer — a friendly successor to the classic KDirStat / KDiskUsage. Browse your file tree by size, find bloated directories, and clean up junk with built-in file actions.

This package runs the full QDirStat desktop GUI in your browser via noVNC. Mount the host paths you want to analyse under /storage (read-only by default) and open the web UI to start scanning.
description: Graphical disk-usage analyzer, running in the browser via noVNC.
